commands.name: query
commands.title: rosync query
commands.description: Matches a selector against the project `tree.json` skeleton without needing the daemon or Studio.
notes: `*` matches one path segment and `**` matches zero or more segments.
Use this first when you only need to discover what exists in the latest Studio tree.

commands.name: path
commands.title: rosync path
commands.description: Translates between Studio instance paths and syncable filesystem paths using `tree.json`.
notes: Studio-authoritative classes are reported clearly instead of pretending they map to files.
Generated files such as `tree.json` and `ro-sync.md` are not syncable Studio instances.

commands.name: lint
commands.title: rosync lint
commands.description: Runs `luau-lsp analyze` against a project or path with an optional Ro Sync sourcemap.
notes: If `--luau-lsp` is omitted, Ro Sync checks `ROSYNC_LUAU_LSP` and then `PATH`.
Bundled Roblox definitions are used automatically when present under `tools/luau-lsp/roblox/`.

commands.name: upload
commands.title: rosync upload
commands.description: Uploads Roblox assets through Open Cloud from files or directories.
notes: Reads credentials from `ROBLOX_API_KEY`, a custom `--api-key-env`, or the widget Secrets store.
Directories recurse by default, skip unsupported files, and continue after per-file failures.
Use `--auth bearer` for OAuth tokens instead of API keys.

commands.name: get
commands.title: rosync get
commands.description: Reads an instance view or one property from the live Studio session.
notes: Requires the daemon and Studio plugin to be connected.
Works across the whole DataModel, not only filesystem-synced classes.

commands.name: ls
commands.title: rosync ls
commands.description: Lists the direct children of a live Studio instance.
notes: An empty path lists top-level DataModel services.
Use `tree` when you need recursive output.

commands.name: tree
commands.title: rosync tree
commands.description: Prints a class and name tree below a live Studio instance.
notes: Depth defaults to 3; use 0 for only the root instance.

commands.name: snapshot
commands.title: rosync snapshot
commands.description: Exports the live Studio tree plus inspectable properties, attributes, and tags to deterministic JSON.
notes: Defaults to `rosync-snapshot-<unix-seconds>.json` under the project or current directory.
Useful for backups, debugging, and comparing Studio state outside the sync surface.

commands.name: diff
commands.title: rosync diff
commands.description: Compares local scripts and folders against the live Studio syncable tree.
notes: Reports items added locally, removed locally, and scripts whose `Source` differs.

commands.name: find
commands.title: rosync find
commands.description: Finds live Studio instances by class name and/or name substring.
notes: Omit `--under` to search the whole DataModel.

commands.name: find-attr
commands.title: rosync find-attr
commands.description: Finds live Studio instances that have a named attribute, optionally matching a value.
notes: `--value` uses the same JSON literal and tagged-value codec as `rosync set --value`.

commands.name: classinfo
commands.title: rosync classinfo
commands.description: Lists properties and methods for a Roblox class using Studio reflection when available.
notes: Falls back to a baked table for common classes when reflection is unavailable.

commands.name: enums
commands.title: rosync enums
commands.description: Lists every Enum type name exposed by the connected Studio session.
notes: Use `rosync enum --name <EnumName>` to inspect one enum's items.

commands.name: enum
commands.title: rosync enum
commands.description: Lists the items for one Roblox Enum type.
notes: Outputs item names and underlying integer values.

commands.name: logs
commands.title: rosync logs
commands.description: Reads recent Studio output, warning, and error messages from the plugin log buffer.
notes: `--tail` streams until interrupted.

commands.name: status
commands.title: rosync status
commands.description: Summarizes daemon reachability, plugin handshake, project config, `tree.json`, sourcemap, and write-log health.
notes: Useful as the first live check before making further CLI calls.

commands.name: doctor
commands.title: rosync doctor
commands.description: Runs a broader health check over project files, daemon, plugin, linter, and sourcemap setup.
notes: Use after `status` when setup or connectivity looks suspicious.

commands.name: ping
commands.title: rosync ping
commands.description: Round-trips a lightweight request to the Studio plugin and reports latency.
notes: A fast way to confirm the plugin WebSocket path is alive.

commands.name: version
commands.title: rosync version
commands.description: Prints the daemon build version and, when reachable, the plugin version.
notes: Useful when checking for mismatched widget, daemon, or plugin installs.

commands.name: refresh
commands.title: rosync refresh
commands.description: Refreshes generated Ro Sync agent docs without starting the daemon.
notes: Updates `ro-sync.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `.codex/config.toml` while preserving project notes outside generated blocks.

commands.name: set
commands.title: rosync set
commands.description: Sets one property or applies a batch of property writes in the live Studio session.
notes: Every successful write is appended to `writes.log`.
`set Parent` is refused by default; use `rosync mv`, or pass `--force-parent` only when raw parent assignment is intentional.
`--waypoint` brackets the write so one Studio undo can reverse the batch.

commands.name: new
commands.title: rosync new
commands.description: Creates a new live Studio instance under a parent path.
notes: `--props` uses the same value codec as `rosync set --value`.
The created instance is written to `writes.log`.

commands.name: rm
commands.title: rosync rm
commands.description: Destroys a live Studio instance.
notes: Calls `:Destroy()` through the plugin and records the write in `writes.log`.

commands.name: mv
commands.title: rosync mv
commands.description: Reparents a live Studio instance to a destination parent path.
notes: Cross-service moves require `--force` to catch accidental DataModel reshuffles.
Use this instead of `rosync set --prop Parent`.

commands.name: attr
commands.title: rosync attr
commands.description: Lists, sets, or removes attributes on a live Studio instance.
notes: `attr ls` is read-only; `attr set` and `attr rm` are written to `writes.log`.
`--value` uses the same JSON literal and tagged-value codec as `rosync set --value`.

commands.name: tag
commands.title: rosync tag
commands.description: Adds or removes CollectionService tags on a live Studio instance.
notes: Successful tag mutations are written to `writes.log`.

commands.name: call
commands.title: rosync call
commands.description: Invokes a method on a live Studio instance and prints the returned value.
notes: `--args` is a JSON array using the same tagged-value codec as `rosync set --value`.
Treat methods with side effects as writes; successful calls are audited.

commands.name: select
commands.title: rosync select
commands.description: Reads or replaces the current Studio Selection.
notes: `select get` is read-only; `select set` is a Studio state change.

commands.name: eval
commands.title: rosync eval
commands.description: Executes Luau source inside Studio through the plugin sandbox.
notes: Use `return ...` when you need a returned value.
This is the broadest escape hatch; ask before using it for mutations.

commands.name: save
commands.title: rosync save
commands.description: Asks Studio to save the current place.
notes: The CLI returns after Studio accepts the save request; the actual save is asynchronous.

commands.name: waypoint
commands.title: rosync waypoint
commands.description: Creates a named Studio change-history waypoint.
notes: Use waypoints before and after multi-step edits so Studio undo has a clear boundary.

commands.name: undo
commands.title: rosync undo
commands.description: Requests Studio to undo one change-history entry.
notes: Pairs naturally with `--waypoint` on `rosync set` for reversible batches.

commands.name: redo
commands.title: rosync redo
commands.description: Requests Studio to redo the last undone change-history entry.
notes: Requires the same live Studio/plugin connection as `undo`.

commands.name: serve
commands.title: rosync serve
commands.description: Runs the local HTTP/WebSocket daemon that bridges the widget, Studio plugin, filesystem watcher, and CLI.
notes: The widget normally launches this for the active project.
Use it manually when debugging daemon/plugin connectivity outside the widget.
